key_points: Science is a systematic study of the natural world based on observation and experimentation
Scientific knowledge evolves as new discoveries replace or improve previous ideas
Scientific methods involve observation, hypothesis, experimentation and conclusion
Technology develops from scientific discoveries and helps improve quality of life
Scientists collaborate and share knowledge to advance scientific understanding
examples: Development of vaccines to prevent infectious diseases
Use of satellites for communication, navigation and weather monitoring
Electric vehicles developed using scientific understanding of energy and motion
Medical imaging technologies such as X-rays and MRI used in healthcare
formulas: Scientific method → Observation → Hypothesis → Experiment → Conclusion
Innovation → Application of scientific knowledge to create new technologies
exam_tips: Understand the steps involved in the scientific method
Learn how scientific discoveries influence technological development
Remember important examples where science improved society
Explain concepts clearly with examples in descriptive answers
